toolArgs.file_text:
# StreamCaster iOS Implementation Plan

## Approach
Implement the StreamCaster iOS RTMP streaming app following the staged dependency graph in IOS_IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN.md. Work proceeds in stages, parallelizing independent tasks within each stage.

## Stages

### Stage 0 — Foundation (No Dependencies)
- T-001: Project Scaffolding & Xcode Setup
- T-002: Data Models & Protocol Contracts

### Stage 1 — Core Infra (Depends on Stage 0)
- T-003: DI Container & Factories
- T-013: Runtime Permissions Handler
- T-032: Info.plist & Entitlements Hardening
- T-038: Structured Logging & Secret Redaction
- T-037: Overlay Architecture Stub

### Stage 2 — Data + Capabilities
- T-004: SettingsRepository (UserDefaults)
- T-005: EndpointProfileRepository (Keychain)
- T-006: DeviceCapabilityQuery

### Stage 3 — Engine Core
- T-007a: StreamingEngine (Lifecycle & State Machine)
- T-014: Orientation Lock Logic
- T-015: Settings Screens

### Stage 4+ — Engine Features, UI, Resilience
- T-007b, T-008, T-009, T-010, T-020, T-022, T-023, T-029
- T-011, T-012, T-016, T-017, T-018, T-019, T-021, T-024
- T-025, T-026, T-027, T-028, T-029, T-030, T-031, T-039-T-043

## Notes
- Beginner-friendly comments in all code
- Simple code preferred over complex
- Git commits at each milestone with descriptive messages
- Phase 5 features (overlay impl, H.265, SRT, multi-dest) are out of scope
